entity.summary: Self-custodial multi-chain trading application combining intent-routed token swaps, cross-chain execution, perpetual trading, and additional DeFi functions in a unified interface.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation exposes active swap and perpetual-trading functions across EVM and Solana. Current independent metrics report non-zero DEX and perpetual aggregator volume. Confidence is medium because trading is combined with wallet management, yield, and other broader application functions. No exact launch date, legal entity, or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Defi App official knowledge base
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Defi App as a decentralized trading platform for multi-chain token swaps and perpetual trading and documents intent-based cross-chain execution.

evidence.title: Defi App aggregator metrics
evidence.notes: Current independent metrics report non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, 30-day, and cumulative DEX and perpetual aggregator volume for Defi App.
